10011010000101011111 - ASI: 13

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 0 * 10
  011 = 0 * 11
  111 = 1 * 11
  01000 = 010 * 00
  01010 = 010 * 10
  10011 = 10 * 011
  11111 = 11 * 111
  0101011111 = 01010 * 11111
  1001101000 = 10011 * 01000
  10011010000101011111 = 1001101000 * 0101011111
